name: LionArray
description: Lean dynamic Array, Queue and Stack for embedded C++. Minimal, allocation-frugal containers for microcontrollers, designed for trivially-copyable element types (primitives, PODs, raw pointers) — enforced at compile time. Non-copyable, header-only, no dependencies.
keywords: array, vector, queue, stack, container, data-structures, embedded, esp8266, esp32, arduino
